recommendations.rationale: Strong daily rebound, but still below key moving averages in a downtrend.
evidence: Latest close 514.0 HKD rose 3.13% on the day, leading the watchlist.
Price remains below MA20 525.595 and MA60 568.5233 with downtrend regime flag.
60-day range position is low at 0.1159, suggesting depressed but not yet repaired technicals.
risks: Rebound may be a counter-trend bounce while price remains below MA20 and MA60.
Volume ratio 0.9515 is below average, so the move lacks clear accumulation confirmation.
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims MA20 with above-average volume; turn more defensive if it breaks below the recent 60-day range support.
